positive: Minimalist abstract jungle scene, dominated by stylized tropical foliage and whimsical forest animals in silhouette. Central composition featuring overlapping banana leaves, monstera, palms, and playful creatures like toucans, macaws, and friendly monkeys. The style should be clean linework combined with solid, deep teal and jungle green negative space, accented by limited pops of mustard yellow and coral orange for contrast. The overall mood is vibrant and serene, perfect for apparel print. Highly detailed, symmetrical composition, strong contrast, flat graphic style, vector art quality, high resolution.
